body:
APPROVE
Clean boundary cleanup: cmd/agent no longer imports internal/session for the historical log/replay/usage flows, and the new DdxAgent methods plus ValidateUsageSince are reflected in CONTRACT-003 with matching public types and derived helpers. Implementation delegates to the existing internal/session aggregator, preserving prior semantics.
